# Saharasoft Solutions

Saharasoft Solutions is a custom software development company based in Nairobi, Kenya. We design, build, and operate digital products for East African businesses — from water utilities and real-estate agencies to logistics fleets and event organizers.

## What we do

- Custom software development for web, mobile, and business operations.
- Product design, discovery, and ongoing engineering support.
- Operate a portfolio of SaaS products serving utilities, logistics, real estate, events, and productivity use cases across East Africa.

## Products

| Product | Live Domain | Category |
|---|---|---|
| Arbec | https://arbecapp.saharasoftsolutions.com | Events & Conferences |
| TallyDue | https://tallydue.com | Water & Utilities |
| Inbuildr | https://inbuildr.com | Productivity / Construction |
| Baylink | https://getbaylink.com | Logistics & Transport |
| GarageOS | https://staging-garage.saharasoft.org | Fleet / Garage Operations |
| Realator | https://realator.api.saharasoft.org | Real Estate |
| Courier | https://courier.saharasoft.org | Logistics & Transport |
| Messaging | https://messaging.prod.saharasoftsolutions.com | Communications |
| LakeVictoria100 | https://lakevictoria100.com | Events / Community |
| Documenter | https://tools.saharasoftsolutions.com | Productivity / Developer Tools |

## Services

- Web and mobile application development
- Custom business software and workflow automation
- Product discovery and UX/UI design
- DevOps, hosting, and ongoing support
- Utility billing and operations software
